title: /kernel
summary_text: `/kernel` is not active. I failed closed and recorded the run as `blocked` under `KERNEL_RUN_ID=chat-kernel-20260402T103842-38340`, because this repo’s Kernel contract requires a valid multi-voice shape and the environment did not meet it per [`.codex/prompts/kernel.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md) and [`docs/requirements-gpt54-codex-kernel.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/requirements-gpt54-codex-kernel.md). Blockers: - `GLM` failed twice on real calls: `fetch failed` - `gemini-cli` was reachable but timed out on a bounded noninteractive probe - `cursor-cli` was not ready - `copilot-cli` failed auth: `No authentication information found` If you want, I can do one of two things next: 1. Repair Kernel bootstrap locally so `/kernel` can activate. 2. Continue your actual task in plain Codex mode without Kernel.
